def count_words(text: str) -> dict[str, int]:
    counts = {}
    for word in text.lower().split():
        if word in counts:
            counts[word] += 1
        else:
            counts[word] = 1
    return counts


def tally_errors(log_lines: list[str]) -> dict[str, int]:
    error_counts = {}
    for line in log_lines:
        if "ERROR" in line:
            parts = line.split()
            error_type = parts[-1] if parts else "unknown"
            if error_type in error_counts:
                error_counts[error_type] += 1
            else:
                error_counts[error_type] = 1
    return error_counts


def group_by_status(items: list[dict]) -> dict[str, list[dict]]:
    grouped = {}
    for item in items:
        status = item.get("status", "unknown")
        if status in grouped:
            grouped[status].append(item)
        else:
            grouped[status] = [item]
    return grouped
